title: Web Browser Automation Flow (TMWebDriver)

steps: START: instantiate TMWebDriver(host, port)
CHECK: socket.connect_ex(host, port+1) == 0 → is_remote?
[If remote] set self.remote = 'http://{host}:{port+1}/link'
[If local] start_ws_server() — spawns WebSocketServer(JSExecutor) as daemon thread
[If local] start_http_server() — spawns Bottle HTTP server as daemon thread
END: driver ready
Browser tab sends WebSocket message with type='ready' or 'ext_ready'/'tabs_update'
JSExecutor.handle() parses JSON
[type=ready] extract sessionId, url, title → call driver._register_client(session_id, ws_client, session_info)
[type=ext_ready/tabs_update] iterate tabs list, mark missing sessions disconnected, register/update each tab
[type=ack] store acks[id]=True
[type=result/error] store results[id]
_register_client: IF new session → create Session(session_id, info, client) → add to self.sessions
_register_client: IF existing → session.reconnect(client, info)
Set self.latest_session_id; if no default → set self.default_session_id
START: do_web_scan(args) → call web_scan(tabs_only, switch_tab_id, text_only)
CHECK: driver is None → call first_init_driver() (creates TMWebDriver, polls sessions up to 20s)
CHECK: get_all_sessions() empty → return error
Build tabs list (id, url truncated to 50 chars) from active sessions
[If switch_tab_id] set driver.default_session_id = switch_tab_id
[If tabs_only=True] return metadata with tabs list only
[Else] reload simphtml module; call simphtml.get_html(driver, cutlist=True, maxchars=35000)
get_html: execute JS findMainList → detect repeating list selectors for cutlist
get_html → get_main_block(driver) → execute JS optHTML() in browser → returns optimized DOM HTML
optimize_html_for_tokens(html): BeautifulSoup cleanup (strip styles, shorten src/href, remove non-essential attrs)
[cutlist enabled] truncate long repeated lists (keep first 3 items + '[FAKE ELEMENT] N more' hint)
[if over maxchars] smart_truncate(soup, maxchars) — recursive proportional truncation
Return {status, metadata:{tabs_count, tabs, active_tab}, content: html_string}
END
START: do_web_execute_js(args) → call web_execute_js(script, switch_tab_id, no_monitor)
CHECK: driver None → first_init_driver()
CHECK: no sessions → return error
[If switch_tab_id] set driver.default_session_id = switch_tab_id
Call simphtml.execute_js_rich(script, driver, no_monitor)
[If not no_monitor] capture baseline: get_html(driver, extra_js=temp_monitor_js) — also starts DOM text monitor (window._tm)
Record before_sids = driver.get_session_dict().keys()
Call driver.execute_js(script) → returns response dict
Extract result from response['data'] or response['result']
Detect page reload: response.get('closed')==1 → reloaded=True
sleep(1) to allow DOM to settle
[If error] catch exception, extract error message
Detect new tabs: compare after session dict vs before_sids
[If not no_monitor and not reloaded] collect transient texts: get_temp_texts(driver) → JS stopStrMonitor()
[If not reloaded and no newTabs] compute DOM diff: find_changed_elements(before_html, after_html)
find_changed_elements: parse before/after with BeautifulSoup, build element signature maps, find new/changed elements
Identify boundary elements (parent not in changed set), find largest top_change
Assemble result: {status, js_return, tab_id, diff, transients, newTabs, reloaded?, error?}
[If save_to_file] write js_return to file, truncate in-memory copy
Return StepOutcome with JSON-formatted result
END
START: execute_js(code, timeout, session_id)
[If is_remote] POST to remote /link with cmd=execute_js → return response
Resolve session: if None or inactive, sleep(3) and retry
[Still inactive] scan alive sessions, auto-switch to first alive session
[None alive] raise ValueError
Determine session type: ws / ext_ws / http
Generate exec_id = uuid4()
Build payload: {id: exec_id, code: code} + tabId if ext_ws
[ws/ext_ws] session.ws_client.send_message(payload)
[http] session.http_queue.put(payload)
clean_sessions() — remove stale sessions (disconnected > 600s)
POLL LOOP (while exec_id not in self.results):
sleep(0.2)
[If ack received] reset start_time (ACK = script delivered)
[ws/ext_ws] check session.is_active(); if went inactive → hasjump=True
[hasjump + session active again] return reload message
[timeout exceeded]:
[hasjump] return 'reloaded and loading' message
[acked, no result] return 'script running, no response' message
[no ack] return 'script not delivered' message
[http + acked] return 'delivered but no result' message
Pop result from self.results; clean self.acks
[result.success=False] raise Exception(result.data)
Build return: {data: result.data, newTabs?: [...]}
END
Browser POSTs to /api/longpoll with {sessionId, url, title}
Server registers/updates Session with type='http', http_queue=Queue()
Server waits up to 5s polling http_queue.get(timeout=0.2)
[Message available] send ACK, return message to browser
[No message in 5s] return {id:'', ret:'next long-poll'}
Browser executes received script, POSTs result to /api/result
/api/result handler stores result/error in self.results[id]

TMWebDriver.key_attrs: sessions:dict, results:dict, acks:dict, default_session_id, latest_session_id, is_remote:bool

Session.key_attrs: id, info, connect_at, disconnect_at, type(ws/ext_ws/http), ws_client, http_queue

key_relationships: GenericAgentHandler uses web_scan and web_execute_js (ga.py module functions)
web_scan and web_execute_js depend on TMWebDriver (global driver singleton)
execute_js_rich calls driver.execute_js(script) and get_html(driver) for before/after diff
TMWebDriver.start_ws_server creates inner JSExecutor class (WebSocket subclass)
Session stores either ws_client (WebSocket) or http_queue (Queue) based on type
branching_conditions: is_remote: routes execute_js to remote HTTP relay vs local execution
session.type in [ws, ext_ws, http]: determines delivery mechanism (WebSocket vs Queue)
tabs_only: skip HTML retrieval in web_scan
no_monitor: skip DOM baseline capture and diff computation in execute_js_rich
exec_id in self.acks: ACK received, reset timeout clock
hasjump: session went inactive then returned (page reload mid-execution)
new_sids detected: new browser tabs opened during JS execution
cutlist: truncate long repeated list elements in HTML output

session_types.ws: Direct WebSocket from page content script
session_types.ext_ws: Browser extension WebSocket managing multiple tabs (sends tabId in payload)
session_types.http: Long-poll HTTP fallback, script delivered via Queue, result via POST /api/result

important_notes: TMWebDriver runs WS server on port 18765, HTTP server on port 18766. Remote mode proxies all calls via HTTP to port 18766. DOM monitoring uses window._tm (interval-based text snapshot). find_changed_elements uses element signature diffing (tag+attrs+text). simphtml.optimize_html_for_tokens strips non-semantic HTML attributes to reduce token count. smart_truncate recursively cuts largest DOM subtrees to fit within maxchars budget.
